name: Wonder Coloring
description: Hey, artist! In Wonder Coloring, you can create vibrant drawings and enjoy magical sounds! Its easy — just draw, color, and relax. Each picture is a new opportunity for your creativity! Share your works with friends!
instructions: Choose the picture you like Click on the parts of the picture to color them Turn on the sound and enjoy the soothing ASMR drawing sounds Your works are automatically saved Draw more to have fun all day long
